creates a new Handlers instance.\n77\tfunc New(cfg *config.Config, be backend.Backend, cache *backend.MetadataCache, footerCache *backend.FooterCache, km *keymanager.KeyManager, listCache listCache,\n84\t\t\tkeyManager:  km,\n85\t\t\tprovenance:  nil,\n86\t\t\tmanifest:    nil,\n87\t\t}\n88\t}\n89\t\n90\t// WithProvenance adds provenance support to handlers.\n91\tfunc (h *Handlers) WithProvenance(p ProvenanceRecorder) {\n92\t\th.provenance = p\n93\t}\n94\t\n95\t// WithManifest wires a ManifestRecorder into the handlers so that successful\n96\t// PutObject and DeleteObject calls update the in-memory index and enqueue\n97\t// delta ops for async B2 persistence.\n98\tfunc (h *Handlers) WithManifest(m ManifestRecorder) {\n99\t\th.manifest = m\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\t// HandleRoot routes S3 operations based on the request.\n103\tfunc (h *Handlers) HandleRoot(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n104\t\tpath := r.URL.Path\n105\t\n106\t\t// Parse bucket and key from path\n107\t\t// Path format: /bucket/key or /bucket\n108\t\tpath = strings.TrimPrefix(path, \"/\")\n109\t\tparts := strings.SplitN(path, \"/\", 2)\n110\t\n111\t\tbucket := \"\"\n112\t\tkey := \"\"\n113\t\tif len(parts) > 0 && parts[0] != \"\" {\n114\t\t\tbucket = parts[0]\n115\t\t}\n116\t\tif len(parts) > 1 {\n117\t\t\tkey = parts[1]\n118\t\t}\n119\t\n120\t\t// Route based on method and path\n121\t\tswitch r.Method {\n122\t\tcase http.MethodGet:\n123\t\t\t// Handle ListMultipartUploads (GET ?uploads on bucket, no key)\n124\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"uploads\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n125\t\t\t\th.ListMultipartUploads(w, r, bucket)\n126\t\t\t\treturn\n127\t\t\t}\n128\t\t\t// Handle ListObjectVersions (GET ?versions on bucket)\n129\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"versions\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n130\t\t\t\th.ListObjectVersions(w, r, bucket)\n131\t\t\t\treturn\n132\t\t\t}\n133\t\t\t// Handle GetBucketLifecycleConfiguration (GET ?lifecycle on bucket)\n134\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"lifecycle\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n135\t\t\t\th.GetBucketLifecycleConfiguration(w, r, bucket)\n136\t\t\t\treturn\n137\t\t\t}\n138\t\t\t// Handle GetObjectLockConfiguration (GET ?object-lock on bucket)\n139\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"object-lock\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n140\t\t\t\th.GetObjectLockConfiguration(w, r, bucket)\n141\t\t\t\treturn\n142\t\t\t}\n143\t\t\t// Handle GetObjectRetention (GET ?retention on object)\n144\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"retention\") && key != \"\" {\n145\t\t\t\th.GetObjectRetention(w, r, bucket, key)\n146\t\t\t\treturn\n147\t\t\t}\n148\t\t\t// Handle GetObjectLegalHold (GET ?legal-hold on object)\n149\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"legal-hold\") && key != \"\" {\n150\t\t\t\th.GetObjectLegalHold(w, r, bucket, key)\n151\t\t\t\treturn\n152\t\t\t}\n153\t\t\t// Handle ListParts (GET ?uploadId on object)\n154\t\t\tif uploadID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"uploadId\"); uploadID != \"\" && key != \"\" {\n155\t\t\t\th.ListParts(w, r, bucket, key, uploadID)\n156\t\t\t\treturn\n157\t\t\t}\n158\t\t\t// Regular Get operations\n159\t\t\tif key != \"\" {\n160\t\t\t\th.GetObject(w, r, bucket, key)\n161\t\t\t} else if bucket != \"\" {\n162\t\t\t\t// Check for query parameters\n163\t\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Get(\"list-type\") != \"\" || r.URL.Query().Get(\"prefix\") != \"\" {\n164\t\t\t\t\th.ListObjectsV2(w, r, bucket)\n165\t\t\t\t} else {\n166\t\t\t\t\th.HeadBucket(w, r, bucket)\n167\t\t\t\t}\n168\t\t\t} else {\n169\t\t\t\th.ListBuckets(w, r)\n170\t\t\t}\n171\t\tcase http.MethodPut:\n172\t\t\t// Handle PutBucketLifecycleConfiguration (PUT ?lifecycle on bucket)\n173\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"lifecycle\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n174\t\t\t\th.PutBucketLifecycleConfiguration(w, r, bucket)\n175\t\t\t\treturn\n176\t\t\t}\n177\t\t\t// Handle PutObjectLockConfiguration (PUT ?object-lock on bucket)\n178\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"object-lock\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n179\t\t\t\th.PutObjectLockConfiguration(w, r, bucket)\n180\t\t\t\treturn\n181\t\t\t}\n182\t\t\t// Handle PutObjectRetention (PUT ?retention on object)\n183\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"retention\") && key != \"\" {\n184\t\t\t\th.PutObjectRetention(w, r, bucket, key)\n185\t\t\t\treturn\n186\t\t\t}\n187\t\t\t// Handle PutObjectLegalHold (PUT ?legal-hold on object)\n188\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"legal-hold\") && key != \"\" {\n189\t\t\t\th.PutObjectLegalHold(w, r, bucket, key)\n190\t\t\t\treturn\n191\t\t\t}\n192\t\t\tif key != \"\" {\n193\t\t\t\t// Check for CopyObject (has x-amz-copy-source header)\n194\t\t\t\tif r.Header.Get(\"x-amz-copy-source\") != \"\" {\n195\t\t\t\t\th.CopyObject(w, r, bucket, key)\n196\t\t\t\t} else {\n197\t\t\t\t\th.PutObject(w, r, bucket, key)\n198\t\t\t\t}\n199\t\t\t} else if bucket != \"\" {\n200\t\t\t\th.CreateBucket(w, r, bucket)\n201\t\t\t}\n202\t\tcase http.MethodHead:\n203\t\t\tif key != \"\" {\n204\t\t\t\th.HeadObject(w, r, bucket, key)\n205\t\t\t} else if bucket != \"\" {\n206\t\t\t\th.HeadBucket(w, r, bucket)\n207\t\t\t}\n208\t\tcase http.MethodDelete:\n209\t\t\t// Handle DeleteBucketLifecycleConfiguration (DELETE ?lifecycle on bucket)\n210\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"lifecycle\") && key == \"\" && bucket != \"\" {\n211\t\t\t\th.DeleteBucketLifecycleConfiguration(w, r, bucket)\n212\t\t\t\treturn\n213\t\t\t}\n214\t\t\t// Handle AbortMultipartUpload (DELETE ?uploadId on object)\n215\t\t\tif uploadID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"uploadId\"); uploadID != \"\" && key != \"\" {\n216\t\t\t\th.AbortMultipartUpload(w, r, bucket, key, uploadID)\n217\t\t\t\treturn\n218\t\t\t}\n219\t\t\tif key != \"\" {\n220\t\t\t\th.DeleteObject(w, r, bucket, key)\n221\t\t\t} else if bucket != \"\" {\n222\t\t\t\th.DeleteBucket(w, r, bucket)\n223\t\t\t}\n224\t\tcase http.MethodPost:\n225\t\t\t// Handle multipart upload operations\n226\t\t\tuploadID := r.URL.Query().Get(\"uploadId\")\n227\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Has(\"uploads\") {\n228\t\t\t\th.CreateMultipartUpload(w, r, bucket, key)\n229\t\t\t} else if uploadID != \"\" {\n230\t\t\t\tif r.URL.Query().Get(\"partNumber\") != \"\" {\n231\t\t\t\t\th.UploadPart(w, r, bucket, key, uploadID)\n232\t\t\t\t} else {\n233\t\t\t\t\th.CompleteMultipartUpload(w, r, bucket, key, uploadID)\n234\t\t\t\t}\n235\t\t\t} else if r.URL.Query().Has(\"delete\") {\n236\t\t\t\t// DeleteObjects (bulk delete) - uses POST with ?delete query param\n237\t\t\t\th.DeleteObjects(w, r, bucket)\n238\t\t\t} else {\n239\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRequest\", \"Unsupported POST operation\", 400)\n240\t\t\t}\n241\t\tdefault:\n242\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"MethodNotAllowed\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Method %s not allowed\", r.Method), 405)\n243\t\t}\n244\t}\n245\t\n246\t// PutObject handles S3 PutObject with encryption.\n247\t// For small files (<10MB), it buffers in memory.\n248\t// For larger files, it uses streaming encryption via temp files to avoid\n249\t// loading the entire file into memory.\n250\tfunc (h *Handlers) PutObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n251\t\tctx := r.Context()\n252\t\n253\t\t// Check Content-Length header\n254\t\tcontentLength := r.ContentLength\n255\t\tstreamingThreshold := int64(10 * 1024 * 1024) // 10MB threshold\n256\t\n257\t\t// Use streaming for large files or unknown size\n258\t\tuseStreaming := contentLength < 0 || contentLength > streamingThreshold\n259\t\n260\t\tif useStreaming {\n261\t\t\th.putObjectStreaming(ctx, w, r, bucket, key)\n262\t\t\treturn\n263\t\t}\n264\t\n265\t\t// Small file: buffer in memory\n266\t\tplaintext, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n267\t\tif err != nil {\n268\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read body: %v\", err), 500)\n269\t\t\treturn\n270\t\t}\n271\t\n272\t\tplaintextSize := int64(len(plaintext))\n273\t\n274\t\t// Get the appropriate MEK for this object key\n275\t\tmek, keyID, err := h.keyManager.GetMEK(key)\n276\t\tif err != nil {\n277\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get encryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n278\t\t\treturn\n279\t\t}\n280\t\n281\t\t// Generate DEK and IV\n282\t\tdek, err := crypto.GenerateDEK()\n283\t\tif err != nil {\n284\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n285\t\t\treturn\n286\t\t}\n287\t\n288\t\tiv, err := crypto.GenerateIV()\n289\t\tif err != nil {\n290\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate IV: %v\", err), 500)\n291\t\t\treturn\n292\t\t}\n293\t\n294\t\t// Wrap DEK with MEK\n295\t\twrappedDEK, err := crypto.WrapDEK(mek, dek)\n296\t\tif err != nil {\n297\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to wrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n298\t\t\treturn\n299\t\t}\n300\t\n301\t\t// Compute plaintext SHA-256\n302\t\tplaintextSHA := crypto.ComputePlaintextSHA256(plaintext)\n303\t\n304\t\t// Create envelope header\n305\t\theader, err := crypto.NewEnvelopeHeader(iv, plaintextSize, h.config.BlockSize, plaintextSHA)\n306\t\tif err != nil {\n307\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create header: %v\", err), 500)\n308\t\t\treturn\n309\t\t}\n310\t\n311\t\theaderBytes, err := header.Encode()\n312\t\tif err != nil {\n313\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to encode header: %v\", err), 500)\n314\t\t\treturn\n315\t\t}\n316\t\n317\t\t// Encrypt data\n318\t\tencryptor, err := crypto.NewEncryptor(dek, iv, h.config.BlockSize)\n319\t\tif err != nil {\n320\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create encryptor: %v\", err), 500)\n321\t\t\treturn\n322\t\t}\n323\t\n324\t\tencrypted, hmacTable, err := encryptor.Encrypt(plaintext)\n325\t\tif err != nil {\n326\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to encrypt: %v\", err), 500)\n327\t\t\treturn\n328\t\t}\n329\t\n330\t\t// Build envelope: header + encrypted blocks + HMAC table\n331\t\tenvelopeSize := int64(len(headerBytes)) + int64(len(encrypted)) + int64(len(hmacTable))\n332\t\tenvelope := make([]byte, 0, envelopeSize)\n333\t\tenvelope = append(envelope, headerBytes...)\n334\t\tenvelope = append(envelope, encrypted...)\n335\t\tenvelope = append(envelope, hmacTable...)\n336\t\n337\t\t// Compute plaintext ETag (MD5)\n338\t\tetag := backend.ComputeETag(plaintext)\n339\t\n340\t\t// Build metadata\n341\t\tcontentType := r.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n342\t\tif contentType == \"\" {\n343\t\t\tcontentType = \"application/octet-stream\"\n344\t\t}\n345\t\n346\t\tmeta := (&backend.ARMORMetadata{\n347\t\t\tVersion:       1,\n348\t\t\tBlockSize:     h.config.BlockSize,\n349\t\t\tPlaintextSize: plaintextSize,\n350\t\t\tContentType:   contentType,\n351\t\t\tIV:            iv,\n352\t\t\tWrappedDEK:    wrappedDEK,\n353\t\t\tPlaintextSHA:  hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]),\n354\t\t\tETag:          etag,\n355\t\t\tKeyID:         keyID,\n356\t\t}).ToMetadata()\n357\t\n358\t\t// Upload to B2\n359\t\tif err := h.backend.Put(ctx, bucket, key, bytes.NewReader(envelope), int64(len(envelope)), meta); err != nil {\n360\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to upload: %v\", err), 500)\n361\t\t\treturn\n362\t\t}\n363\t\n364\t\t// Record in manifest for fast metadata lookup (async B2 persistence)\n365\t\tif h.manifest != nil {\n366\t\t\th.manifest.RecordPut(bucket, key, plaintextSize, hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]), iv, wrappedDEK, h.config.BlockSize, contentType, etag)\n367\t\t}\n368\t\n369\t\t// Record provenance\n370\t\tif h.provenance != nil && h.provenance.ShouldRecord(key) {\n371\t\t\tplaintextSHAHex := hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:])\n372\t\t\t_ = h.provenance.RecordUpload(ctx, key, plaintextSHAHex, \"put\")\n373\t\t}\n374\t\n375\t\t// Invalidate list cache entries covering this key's directory\n376\t\tif h.listCache != nil {\n377\t\t\th.listCache.InvalidatePrefix(bucket, path.Dir(key)+\"/\")\n378\t\t}\n379\t\n380\t\t// Return ETag\n381\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, etag))\n382\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n383\t}\n384\t\n385\t// putObjectStreaming handles large file uploads with streaming encryption.\n386\t// It uses a temp file to avoid loading the entire plaintext into memory.\n387\t// The process is:\n388\t// 1. Stream request body to temp file while computing SHA-256\n389\t// 2. Create envelope header with the computed SHA-256\n390\t// 3. Stream from temp file through encryption to B2 via io.Pipe\n391\t// 4. Clean up temp file\n392\tfunc (h *Handlers) putObjectStreaming(ctx context.Context, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n393\t\t// Phase 1: Stream to temp file and compute SHA-256\n394\t\ttmpFile, err := os.CreateTemp(\"\", \"armor-upload-*.tmp\")\n395\t\tif err != nil {\n396\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create temp file: %v\", err), 500)\n397\t\t\treturn\n398\t\t}\n399\t\ttmpPath := tmpFile.Name()\n400\t\tdefer os.Remove(tmpPath) // Clean up on exit\n401\t\n402\t\t// Compute SHA-256 while copying to temp file\n403\t\tplaintextHash := sha256.New()\n404\t\tteeReader := io.TeeReader(r.Body, plaintextHash)\n405\t\n406\t\tplaintextSize, err := io.Copy(tmpFile, teeReader)\n407\t\tif err != nil {\n408\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n409\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read body: %v\", err), 500)\n410\t\t\treturn\n411\t\t}\n412\t\n413\t\t// Get the computed SHA-256\n414\t\tvar plaintextSHA [32]byte\n415\t\tcopy(plaintextSHA[:], plaintextHash.Sum(nil))\n416\t\n417\t\t// Seek back to beginning of temp file for reading\n418\t\tif _, err := tmpFile.Seek(0, 0); err != nil {\n419\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n420\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to seek temp file: %v\", err), 500)\n421\t\t\treturn\n422\t\t}\n423\t\n424\t\t// Phase 2: Get encryption keys\n425\t\tmek, keyID, err := h.keyManager.GetMEK(key)\n426\t\tif err != nil {\n427\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n428\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get encryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n429\t\t\treturn\n430\t\t}\n431\t\n432\t\tdek, err := crypto.GenerateDEK()\n433\t\tif err != nil {\n434\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n435\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n436\t\t\treturn\n437\t\t}\n438\t\n439\t\tiv, err := crypto.GenerateIV()\n440\t\tif err != nil {\n441\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n442\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate IV: %v\", err), 500)\n443\t\t\treturn\n444\t\t}\n445\t\n446\t\twrappedDEK, err := crypto.WrapDEK(mek, dek)\n447\t\tif err != nil {\n448\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n449\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to wrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n450\t\t\treturn\n451\t\t}\n452\t\n453\t\t// Create envelope header\n454\t\theader, err := crypto.NewEnvelopeHeader(iv, plaintextSize, h.config.BlockSize, plaintextSHA)\n455\t\tif err != nil {\n456\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n457\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create header: %v\", err), 500)\n458\t\t\treturn\n459\t\t}\n460\t\n461\t\theaderBytes, err := header.Encode()\n462\t\tif err != nil {\n463\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n464\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to encode header: %v\", err), 500)\n465\t\t\treturn\n466\t\t}\n467\t\n468\t\t// Create encryptor\n469\t\tencryptor, err := crypto.NewEncryptor(dek, iv, h.config.BlockSize)\n470\t\tif err != nil {\n471\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n472\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create encryptor: %v\", err), 500)\n473\t\t\treturn\n474\t\t}\n475\t\n476\t\t// Calculate envelope size\n477\t\tblockCount := crypto.ComputeBlockCount(plaintextSize, h.config.BlockSize)\n478\t\thmacTableSize := int64(blockCount) * crypto.HMACSize\n479\t\tenvelopeSize := int64(len(headerBytes)) + plaintextSize + hmacTableSize\n480\t\n481\t\t// Phase 3: Stream encrypt via io.Pipe\n482\t\tpr, pw := io.Pipe()\n483\t\n484\t\t// Start encryption goroutine\n485\t\tencErr := make(chan error, 1)\n486\t\tgo func() {\n487\t\t\tdefer pw.Close()\n488\t\t\tdefer close(encErr)\n489\t\n490\t\t\t// Write header\n491\t\t\tif _, err := pw.Write(headerBytes); err != nil {\n492\t\t\t\tencErr <- fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write header: %w\", err)\n493\t\t\t\treturn\n494\t\t\t}\n495\t\n496\t\t\t// Stream encrypt the plaintext\n497\t\t\thmacTable, err := encryptor.EncryptStream(tmpFile, pw, plaintextSize)\n498\t\t\tif err != nil {\n499\t\t\t\tencErr <- fmt.Errorf(\"encryption failed: %w\", err)\n500\t\t\t\treturn\n501\t\t\t}\n502\t\n503\t\t\t// Write HMAC table\n504\t\t\tif _, err := pw.Write(hmacTable); err != nil {\n505\t\t\t\tencErr <- fmt.Errorf(\"failed to write HMAC table: %w\", err)\n506\t\t\t\treturn\n507\t\t\t}\n508\t\n509\t\t\tencErr <- nil\n510\t\t}()\n511\t\n512\t\t// Build metadata\n513\t\tcontentType := r.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n514\t\tif contentType == \"\" {\n515\t\t\tcontentType = \"application/octet-stream\"\n516\t\t}\n517\t\n518\t\t// Compute ETag while we have the temp file\n519\t\t// We need to read the file again for MD5, but we already have SHA-256\n520\t\t// Use SHA-256 truncated to 16 bytes as ETag for streaming (non-standard but works)\n521\t\tetag := hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:16])\n522\t\n523\t\tmeta := (&backend.ARMORMetadata{\n524\t\t\tVersion:       1,\n525\t\t\tBlockSize:     h.config.BlockSize,\n526\t\t\tPlaintextSize: plaintextSize,\n527\t\t\tContentType:   contentType,\n528\t\t\tIV:            iv,\n529\t\t\tWrappedDEK:    wrappedDEK,\n530\t\t\tPlaintextSHA:  hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]),\n531\t\t\tETag:          etag,\n532\t\t\tKeyID:         keyID,\n533\t\t}).ToMetadata()\n534\t\n535\t\t// Upload to B2 using streaming reader\n536\t\tif err := h.backend.Put(ctx, bucket, key, pr, envelopeSize, meta); err != nil {\n537\t\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n538\t\t\t// Check if there was an encryption error\n539\t\t\tselect {\n540\t\t\tcase encErrVal := <-encErr:\n541\t\t\t\tif encErrVal != nil {\n542\t\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Encryption error: %v\", encErrVal), 500)\n543\t\t\t\t\treturn\n544\t\t\t\t}\n545\t\t\tdefault:\n546\t\t\t}\n547\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to upload: %v\", err), 500)\n548\t\t\treturn\n549\t\t}\n550\t\n551\t\t// Close temp file\n552\t\ttmpFile.Close()\n553\t\n554\t\t// Check for encryption errors\n555\t\tif encErrVal := <-encErr; encErrVal != nil {\n556\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Encryption error: %v\", encErrVal), 500)\n557\t\t\treturn\n558\t\t}\n559\t\n560\t\t// Record in manifest for fast metadata lookup (async B2 persistence)\n561\t\tif h.manifest != nil {\n562\t\t\th.manifest.RecordPut(bucket, key, plaintextSize, hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]), iv, wrappedDEK, h.config.BlockSize, contentType, etag)\n563\t\t}\n564\t\n565\t\t// Record provenance\n566\t\tif h.provenance != nil && h.provenance.ShouldRecord(key) {\n567\t\t\tplaintextSHAHex := hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:])\n568\t\t\t_ = h.provenance.RecordUpload(ctx, key, plaintextSHAHex, \"put-streaming\")\n569\t\t}\n570\t\n571\t\t// Invalidate list cache entries covering this key's directory\n572\t\tif h.listCache != nil {\n573\t\t\th.listCache.InvalidatePrefix(bucket, path.Dir(key)+\"/\")\n574\t\t}\n575\t\n576\t\t// Return ETag\n577\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, etag))\n578\t\tw.Header().Set(\"X-Armor-Streaming\", \"true\")\n579\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n580\t}\n581\t\n582\t// GetObject handles S3 GetObject with decryption and range support.\n583\tfunc (h *Handlers) GetObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n584\t\tctx := r.Context()\n585\t\n586\t\t// Get metadata first\n587\t\tinfo, err := h.backend.Head(ctx, bucket, key)\n588\t\tif err != nil {\n589\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchKey\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Object not found: %v\", err), 404)\n590\t\t\treturn\n591\t\t}\n592\t\n593\t\tif !info.IsARMOREncrypted {\n594\t\t\t// Check conditional request headers for non-ARMOR objects\n595\t\t\tif status := checkConditionalRequest(r, info.ETag, info.LastModified); status != 0 {\n596\t\t\t\tif status == http.StatusNotModified {\n597\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, info.ETag))\n598\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", info.LastModified.UTC().Format(\"2006-01-02T15:04:05.000Z\"))\n599\t\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n600\t\t\t\t} else {\n601\t\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"PreconditionFailed\", \"Precondition failed\", status)\n602\t\t\t\t}\n603\t\t\t\treturn\n604\t\t\t}\n605\t\n606\t\t\t// Passthrough for non-ARMOR objects\n607\t\t\tbody, _, err := h.backend.Get(ctx, bucket, key)\n608\t\t\tif err != nil {\n609\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get object: %v\", err), 500)\n610\t\t\t\treturn\n611\t\t\t}\n612\t\t\tdefer body.Close()\n613\t\n614\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(info.Size, 10))\n615\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", info.ContentType)\n616\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, info.ETag))\n617\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", info.LastModified.UTC().Format(\"2006-01-02T15:04:05.000Z\"))\n618\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n619\t\t\tio.Copy(w, body)\n620\t\t\treturn\n621\t\t}\n622\t\n623\t\t// Parse ARMOR metadata\n624\t\tarmorMeta, ok := backend.ParseARMORMetadata(info.Metadata)\n625\t\tif !ok {\n626\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to parse ARMOR metadata\", 500)\n627\t\t\treturn\n628\t\t}\n629\t\n630\t\t// Get the MEK for this object using the key ID from metadata\n631\t\tmek, err := h.keyManager.GetMEKByID(armorMeta.KeyID)\n632\t\tif err != nil {\n633\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get decryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n634\t\t\treturn\n635\t\t}\n636\t\n637\t\t// Unwrap DEK\n638\t\tdek, err := crypto.UnwrapDEK(mek, armorMeta.WrappedDEK)\n639\t\tif err != nil {\n640\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to unwrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n641\t\t\treturn\n642\t\t}\n643\t\n644\t\t// Create decryptor\n645\t\tdecryptor, err := crypto.NewDecryptor(dek, armorMeta.IV, armorMeta.BlockSize)\n646\t\tif err != nil {\n647\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create decryptor: %v\", err), 500)\n648\t\t\treturn\n649\t\t}\n650\t\n651\t\tplaintextSize := armorMeta.PlaintextSize\n652\t\n653\t\t// Check conditional request headers\n654\t\tif status := checkConditionalRequest(r, armorMeta.ETag, info.LastModified); status != 0 {\n655\t\t\tif status == http.StatusNotModified {\n656\t\t\t\t// 304 Not Modified - set headers but no body\n657\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, armorMeta.ETag))\n658\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", info.LastModified.UTC().Format(http.TimeFormat))\n659\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n660\t\t\t} else {\n661\t\t\t\t// 412 Precondition Failed\n662\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"PreconditionFailed\", \"Precondition failed\", status)\n663\t\t\t}\n664\t\t\treturn\n665\t\t}\n666\t\n667\t\t// Check for range request\n668\t\trangeHeader := r.Header.Get(\"Range\")\n669\t\tif rangeHeader != \"\" {\n670\t\t\th.handleRangeRequest(w, r, bucket, key, decryptor, armorMeta, plaintextSize)\n671\t\t\treturn\n672\t\t}\n673\t\n674\t\t// Full object download with pipelined stream decryption\n675\t\th.handleFullObjectStream(w, r, bucket, key, decryptor, armorMeta, plaintextSize)\n676\t}\n677\t\n678\t// handleFullObjectStream handles full object downloads with pipelined stream decryption.\n679\t// This uses io.Pipe to decrypt blocks as they stream from Cloudflare, reducing\n680\t// time-to-first-byte and memory usage compared to buffering the entire envelope.\n681\tfunc (h *Handlers) handleFullObjectStream(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string, decryptor *crypto.Decryptor, armorMeta *backend.ARMORMetadata, plaintextSize int64) {\n682\t\tctx := r.Context()\n683\t\n684\t\tblockSize := armorMeta.BlockSize\n685\t\tblockCount := int(crypto.ComputeBlockCount(plaintextSize, blockSize))\n686\t\n687\t\t// Calculate offsets\n688\t\thmacTableOffset := crypto.HeaderSize + plaintextSize\n689\t\thmacTableSize := int64(blockCount) * crypto.HMACSize\n690\t\tdataSize := plaintextSize\n691\t\n692\t\t// 1. Prefetch HMAC table (small range read)\n693\t\thmacBody, err := h.backend.GetRange(ctx, bucket, key, hmacTableOffset, hmacTableSize)\n694\t\tif err != nil {\n695\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to prefetch HMAC table: %v\", err), 500)\n696\t\t\treturn\n697\t\t}\n698\t\thmacTable, err := io.ReadAll(hmacBody)\n699\t\thmacBody.Close()\n700\t\tif err != nil {\n701\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read HMAC table: %v\", err), 500)\n702\t\t\treturn\n703\t\t}\n704\t\n705\t\t// 2. Start streaming data from Cloudflare (header + encrypted blocks, stop before HMAC)\n706\t\tstreamSize := crypto.HeaderSize + dataSize\n707\t\tdataBody, err := h.backend.GetRange(ctx, bucket, key, 0, streamSize)\n708\t\tif err != nil {\n709\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get object stream: %v\", err), 500)\n710\t\t\treturn\n711\t\t}\n712\t\tdefer dataBody.Close()\n713\t\n714\t\t// 3. Read and discard the 64-byte header\n715\t\theaderBuf := make([]byte, crypto.HeaderSize)\n716\t\tif _, err := io.ReadFull(dataBody, headerBuf); err != nil {\n717\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read header: %v\", err), 500)\n718\t\t\treturn\n719\t\t}\n720\t\n721\t\t// Parse header to get plaintext SHA for verification\n722\t\theader, err := crypto.DecodeHeader(headerBuf)\n723\t\tif err != nil {\n724\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to decode header: %v\", err), 500)\n725\t\t\treturn\n726\t\t}\n727\t\n728\t\t// 4. Set response headers before streaming\n729\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(plaintextSize, 10))\n730\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", armorMeta.ContentType)\n731\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, armorMeta.ETag))\n732\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n733\t\tw.Header().Set(\"X-Armor-Stream\", \"pipelined\")\n734\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n735\t\n736\t\t// 5. Stream decrypt using io.Pipe\n737\t\tpr, pw := io.Pipe()\n738\t\n739\t\t// Start decryption goroutine\n740\t\tgo func() {\n741\t\t\tdefer pw.Close()\n742\t\n743\t\t\tplaintextHash := sha256.New()\n744\t\t\tencryptedBuf := make([]byte, blockSize)\n745\t\n746\t\t\tfor blockIndex := 0; blockIndex < blockCount; blockIndex++ {\n747\t\t\t\t// Calculate actual block size (last block may be smaller)\n748\t\t\t\tremaining := plaintextSize - int64(blockIndex)*int64(blockSize)\n749\t\t\t\tactualBlockSize := int(min64(int64(blockSize), remaining))\n750\t\n751\t\t\t\t// Read encrypted block\n752\t\t\t\tencryptedBuf = encryptedBuf[:actualBlockSize]\n753\t\t\t\tn, err := io.ReadFull(dataBody, encryptedBuf)\n754\t\t\t\tif err != nil && err != io.EOF && err != io.ErrUnexpectedEOF {\n755\t\t\t\t\tpw.CloseWithError(fmt.Errorf(\"read error at block %d: %w\", blockIndex, err))\n756\t\t\t\t\treturn\n757\t\t\t\t}\n758\t\t\t\tif n == 0 {\n759\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n760\t\t\t\t}\n761\t\t\t\tencryptedBuf = encryptedBuf[:n]\n762\t\n763\t\t\t\t// Verify HMAC\n764\t\t\t\thmacOffset := blockIndex * crypto.HMACSize\n765\t\t\t\tif hmacOffset+crypto.HMACSize > len(hmacTable) {\n766\t\t\t\t\tpw.CloseWithError(fmt.Errorf(\"HMAC table too short at block %d\", blockIndex))\n767\t\t\t\t\treturn\n768\t\t\t\t}\n769\t\t\t\texpectedHMAC := hmacTable[hmacOffset : hmacOffset+crypto.HMACSize]\n770\t\n771\t\t\t\tmac := hmac.New(sha256.New, decryptor.HMACKey())\n772\t\t\t\tindexBytes := make([]byte, 4)\n773\t\t\t\tbinary.BigEndian.PutUint32(indexBytes, uint32(blockIndex))\n774\t\t\t\tmac.Write(indexBytes)\n775\t\t\t\tmac.Write(encryptedBuf)\n776\t\t\t\tcomputed := mac.Sum(nil)\n777\t\n778\t\t\t\tif !hmac.Equal(computed, expectedHMAC) {\n779\t\t\t\t\tpw.CloseWithError(fmt.Errorf(\"block %d: HMAC verification failed\", blockIndex))\n780\t\t\t\t\treturn\n781\t\t\t\t}\n782\t\n783\t\t\t\t// Decrypt block (need to use CTR stream)\n784\t\t\t\tdecrypted := make([]byte, n)\n785\t\t\t\tctr := makeCounter(armorMeta.IV, uint32(blockIndex))\n786\t\t\t\tstream := cipher.NewCTR(decryptor.CipherBlock(), ctr)\n787\t\t\t\tstream.XORKeyStream(decrypted, encryptedBuf)\n788\t\n789\t\t\t\t// Update plaintext hash for verification\n790\t\t\t\tplaintextHash.Write(decrypted)\n791\t\n792\t\t\t\t// Write plaintext to pipe\n793\t\t\t\tif _, err := pw.Write(decrypted); err != nil {\n794\t\t\t\t\tpw.CloseWithError(fmt.Errorf(\"write error at block %d: %w\", blockIndex, err))\n795\t\t\t\t\treturn\n796\t\t\t\t}\n797\t\t\t}\n798\t\n799\t\t\t// Verify plaintext SHA-256\n800\t\t\tcomputedSHA := plaintextHash.Sum(nil)\n801\t\t\tif !bytes.Equal(computedSHA, header.PlaintextSHA[:]) {\n802\t\t\t\tpw.CloseWithError(fmt.Errorf(\"plaintext SHA-256 mismatch\"))\n803\t\t\t\treturn\n804\t\t\t}\n805\t\t}()\n806\t\n807\t\t// Stream plaintext to client\n808\t\tio.Copy(w, pr)\n809\t}\n810\t\n811\t// makeCounter creates a 16-byte counter value from the IV and block index.\n812\tfunc makeCounter(iv []byte, blockIndex uint32) []byte {\n813\t\tcounter := make([]byte, 16)\n814\t\tcopy(counter[0:12], iv[0:12])\n815\t\tbinary.BigEndian.PutUint32(counter[12:16], blockIndex)\n816\t\treturn counter\n817\t}\n818\t\n819\tfunc min64(a, b int64) int64 {\n820\t\tif a < b {\n821\t\t\treturn a\n822\t\t}\n823\t\treturn b\n824\t}\n825\t\n826\t// handleRangeRequest handles range read requests.\n827\tfunc (h *Handlers) handleRangeRequest(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string, decryptor *crypto.Decryptor, armorMeta *backend.ARMORMetadata, plaintextSize int64) {\n828\t\tctx := r.Context()\n829\t\n830\t\t// Parse range header (bytes=start-end)\n831\t\trangeHeader := r.Header.Get(\"Range\")\n832\t\tstart, end, err := parseRangeHeader(rangeHeader, plaintextSize)\n833\t\tif err != nil {\n834\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRange\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Invalid range: %v\", err), 400)\n835\t\t\treturn\n836\t\t}\n837\t\n838\t\t// Check if this is a Parquet footer request and we have it cached\n839\t\t// DuckDB reads footer in two steps: last 8 bytes, then footer body\n840\t\t// Footer is at the end of the file: [footer_metadata][footer_length (4B)][PAR1 (4B)]\n841\t\tif h.footerCache != nil && end >= plaintextSize-8 {\n842\t\t\t// This range includes the end of the file - could be a footer read\n843\t\t\tif footer, ok := h.footerCache.Get(bucket, key, armorMeta.ETag); ok {\n844\t\t\t\t// We have a cached footer, serve from cache\n845\t\t\t\tfooterStart := plaintextSize - int64(len(footer))\n846\t\t\t\tif start >= footerStart {\n847\t\t\t\t\t// Request is entirely within the cached footer\n848\t\t\t\t\toffset := start - footerStart\n849\t\t\t\t\tfooterEnd := offset + (end - start + 1)\n850\t\t\t\t\tif footerEnd <= int64(len(footer)) {\n851\t\t\t\t\t\tplaintext := footer[offset:footerEnd]\n852\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(int64(len(plaintext)), 10))\n853\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", armorMeta.ContentType)\n854\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, armorMeta.ETag))\n855\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n856\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Range\", fmt.Sprintf(\"bytes %d-%d/%d\", start, end, plaintextSize))\n857\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"X-Armor-Footer-Cache\", \"HIT\")\n858\t\t\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusPartialContent)\n859\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Write(plaintext)\n860\t\t\t\t\t\treturn\n861\t\t\t\t\t}\n862\t\t\t\t}\n863\t\t\t}\n864\t\t}\n865\t\n866\t\t// Translate range to encrypted blocks\n867\t\ttranslation, err := crypto.TranslateRange(start, end, plaintextSize, armorMeta.BlockSize, crypto.HeaderSize)\n868\t\tif err != nil {\n869\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to translate range: %v\", err), 500)\n870\t\t\treturn\n871\t\t}\n872\t\n873\t\t// Fetch encrypted blocks and HMAC table in parallel using errgroup.\n874\t\t// This cuts range-read latency nearly in half for cache misses.\n875\t\tvar encrypted, hmacTable []byte\n876\t\n877\t\tg, gctx := errgroup.WithContext(ctx)\n878\t\n879\t\tg.Go(func() error {\n880\t\t\tencryptedBody, err := h.backend.GetRange(gctx, bucket, key, translation.DataOffset, translation.DataLength)\n881\t\t\tif err != nil {\n882\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch encrypted blocks: %w\", err)\n883\t\t\t}\n884\t\t\tdefer encryptedBody.Close()\n885\t\n886\t\t\tencrypted, err = io.ReadAll(encryptedBody)\n887\t\t\tif err != nil {\n888\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read encrypted blocks: %w\", err)\n889\t\t\t}\n890\t\t\treturn nil\n891\t\t})\n892\t\n893\t\tg.Go(func() error {\n894\t\t\thmacBody, err := h.backend.GetRange(gctx, bucket, key, translation.HMACOffset, translation.HMACLength)\n895\t\t\tif err != nil {\n896\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch HMAC table: %w\", err)\n897\t\t\t}\n898\t\t\tdefer hmacBody.Close()\n899\t\n900\t\t\thmacTable, err = io.ReadAll(hmacBody)\n901\t\t\tif err != nil {\n902\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read HMAC table: %w\", err)\n903\t\t\t}\n904\t\t\treturn nil\n905\t\t})\n906\t\n907\t\tif err := g.Wait(); err != nil {\n908\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", err.Error(), 500)\n909\t\t\treturn\n910\t\t}\n911\t\n912\t\t// Decrypt range\n913\t\tplaintext, err := decryptor.DecryptRange(encrypted, hmacTable, start, end, plaintextSize)\n914\t\tif err != nil {\n915\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to decrypt range: %v\", err), 500)\n916\t\t\treturn\n917\t\t}\n918\t\n919\t\t// Cache Parquet footer if this looks like a footer read\n920\t\t// Footer is detected by: 1) Reading near end of file, 2) Data ends with \"PAR1\" magic\n921\t\tif h.footerCache != nil && end >= plaintextSize-8 && len(plaintext) >= 8 {\n922\t\t\tif backend.IsParquetFile(plaintext[len(plaintext)-4:]) {\n923\t\t\t\t// This is a Parquet file, try to cache the full footer\n924\t\t\t\t// If we just read the last 8 bytes, cache it for footer length detection\n925\t\t\t\t// If we read more, it might be the full footer\n926\t\t\t\th.cacheParquetFooter(ctx, bucket, key, armorMeta, plaintext, plaintextSize)\n927\t\t\t}\n928\t\t}\n929\t\n930\t\t// Set response headers\n931\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(int64(len(plaintext)), 10))\n932\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", armorMeta.ContentType)\n933\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, armorMeta.ETag))\n934\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n935\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Range\", fmt.Sprintf(\"bytes %d-%d/%d\", start, end, plaintextSize))\n936\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusPartialContent)\n937\t\tw.Write(plaintext)\n938\t}\n939\t\n940\t// cacheParquetFooter caches Parquet footer data for faster subsequent reads.\n941\tfunc (h *Handlers) cacheParquetFooter(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string, armorMeta *backend.ARMORMetadata, plaintext []byte, plaintextSize int64) {\n942\t\t// If we got the last 8 bytes, we can determine footer length\n943\t\tif len(plaintext) == 8 {\n944\t\t\t// This is the footer length read - cache a small marker\n945\t\t\t// The actual footer will be cached on the next read\n946\t\t\treturn\n947\t\t}\n948\t\n949\t\t// Check if we have the full footer by verifying PAR1 magic at end\n950\t\tif len(plaintext) >= 8 && backend.IsParquetFile(plaintext[len(plaintext)-4:]) {\n951\t\t\t// We have at least part of the footer\n952\t\t\t// Parse footer length from the last 8 bytes if available\n953\t\t\tfooterRange, err := backend.GetParquetFooterRange(plaintext[len(plaintext)-8:], plaintextSize)\n954\t\t\tif err != nil {\n955\t\t\t\treturn\n956\t\t\t}\n957\t\n958\t\t\t// Check if we have the complete footer\n959\t\t\tfooterStart := plaintextSize - int64(footerRange.Length) - 8\n960\t\t\trequestStart := plaintextSize - int64(len(plaintext))\n961\t\n962\t\t\tif requestStart <= footerStart {\n963\t\t\t\t// We have the complete footer, extract and cache it\n964\t\t\t\tfooterOffset := footerStart - requestStart\n965\t\t\t\tif footerOffset >= 0 && int(footerOffset)+footerRange.Length+8 <= len(plaintext) {\n966\t\t\t\t\tfooter := plaintext[footerOffset : int(footerOffset)+footerRange.Length+8]\n967\t\t\t\t\th.footerCache.Set(bucket, key, armorMeta.ETag, footer)\n968\t\t\t\t}\n969\t\t\t}\n970\t\t}\n971\t}\n972\t\n973\t// checkConditionalRequest evaluates conditional headers and returns the appropriate\n974\t// response status. Returns 0 if the request should proceed normally.\n975\t// Supports: If-Match, If-None-Match, If-Modified-Since, If-Unmodified-Since\n976\tfunc checkConditionalRequest(r *http.Request, etag string, lastModified time.Time) int {\n977\t\tifMatch := r.Header.Get(\"If-Match\")\n978\t\tifNoneMatch := r.Header.Get(\"If-None-Match\")\n979\t\tifModifiedSince := r.Header.Get(\"If-Modified-Since\")\n980\t\tifUnmodifiedSince := r.Header.Get(\"If-Unmodified-Since\")\n981\t\n982\t\t// Normalize ETag (remove quotes if present for comparison)\n983\t\tnormalizedETag := strings.Trim(etag, `\"`)\n984\t\n985\t\t// If-Match: Return 412 Precondition Failed if ETag doesn't match\n986\t\tif ifMatch != \"\" {\n987\t\t\t// If-Match can be \"*\" (match any) or a comma-separated list of ETags\n988\t\t\tif ifMatch == \"*\" {\n989\t\t\t\t// Match any existing resource - proceed\n990\t\t\t} else {\n991\t\t\t\t// Parse comma-separated ETags\n992\t\t\t\tetags := strings.Split(ifMatch, \",\")\n993\t\t\t\tmatched := false\n994\t\t\t\tfor _, e := range etags {\n995\t\t\t\t\t// Trim space first, then quotes (order matters for \" value\" case)\n996\t\t\t\t\te = strings.Trim(strings.TrimSpace(e), `\"`)\n997\t\t\t\t\tif e == normalizedETag {\n998\t\t\t\t\t\tmatched = true\n999\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n1000\t\t\t\t\t}\n1001\t\t\t\t}\n1002\t\t\t\tif !matched {\n1003\t\t\t\t\treturn http.StatusPreconditionFailed\n1004\t\t\t\t}\n1005\t\t\t}\n1006\t\t}\n1007\t\n1008\t\t// If-Unmodified-Since: Return 412 Precondition Failed if modified since date\n1009\t\tif ifUnmodifiedSince != \"\" {\n1010\t\t\tif t, err := http.ParseTime(ifUnmodifiedSince); err == nil {\n1011\t\t\t\tif lastModified.After(t) {\n1012\t\t\t\t\treturn http.StatusPreconditionFailed\n1013\t\t\t\t}\n1014\t\t\t}\n1015\t\t}\n1016\t\n1017\t\t// If-None-Match: Return 304 Not Modified if ETag matches\n1018\t\tif ifNoneMatch != \"\" {\n1019\t\t\t// If-None-Match can be \"*\" (match any) or a comma-separated list of ETags\n1020\t\t\tif ifNoneMatch == \"*\" {\n1021\t\t\t\treturn http.StatusNotModified\n1022\t\t\t}\n1023\t\t\t// Parse comma-separated ETags\n1024\t\t\tetags := strings.Split(ifNoneMatch, \",\")\n1025\t\t\tfor _, e := range etags {\n1026\t\t\t\t// Trim space first, then quotes (order matters for \" value\" case)\n1027\t\t\t\te = strings.Trim(strings.TrimSpace(e), `\"`)\n1028\t\t\t\tif e == normalizedETag {\n1029\t\t\t\t\treturn http.StatusNotModified\n1030\t\t\t\t}\n1031\t\t\t}\n1032\t\t}\n1033\t\n1034\t\t// If-Modified-Since: Return 304 Not Modified if not modified since date\n1035\t\t// Only applies if If-None-Match is not present (per RFC 7232)\n1036\t\tif ifModifiedSince != \"\" && ifNoneMatch == \"\" {\n1037\t\t\tif t, err := http.ParseTime(ifModifiedSince); err == nil {\n1038\t\t\t\t// Use >= comparison per RFC 7232\n1039\t\t\t\tif !lastModified.After(t) {\n1040\t\t\t\t\treturn http.StatusNotModified\n1041\t\t\t\t}\n1042\t\t\t}\n1043\t\t}\n1044\t\n1045\t\treturn 0\n1046\t}\n1047\t\n1048\t// parseRangeHeader parses a Range header like \"bytes=0-1023\".\n1049\tfunc parseRangeHeader(header string, totalSize int64) (start, end int64, err error) {\n1050\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(header, \"bytes=\") {\n1051\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid range format\")\n1052\t\t}\n1053\t\n1054\t\trangeSpec := strings.TrimPrefix(header, \"bytes=\")\n1055\t\n1056\t\tif strings.Contains(rangeSpec, \",\") {\n1057\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"multiple ranges not supported\")\n1058\t\t}\n1059\t\n1060\t\tparts := strings.Split(rangeSpec, \"-\")\n1061\t\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n1062\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid range format\")\n1063\t\t}\n1064\t\n1065\t\tif parts[0] == \"\" {\n1066\t\t\t// Suffix range: -500 means last 500 bytes\n1067\t\t\tsuffix, err := strconv.ParseInt(parts[1], 10, 64)\n1068\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1069\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1070\t\t\t}\n1071\t\t\tstart = totalSize - suffix\n1072\t\t\tend = totalSize - 1\n1073\t\t} else {\n1074\t\t\tstart, err = strconv.ParseInt(parts[0], 10, 64)\n1075\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1076\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1077\t\t\t}\n1078\t\t\tif parts[1] == \"\" {\n1079\t\t\t\tend = totalSize - 1\n1080\t\t\t} else {\n1081\t\t\t\tend, err = strconv.ParseInt(parts[1], 10, 64)\n1082\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1083\t\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1084\t\t\t\t}\n1085\t\t\t}\n1086\t\t}\n1087\t\n1088\t\tif start < 0 || start >= totalSize || end < start || end >= totalSize {\n1089\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"range out of bounds\")\n1090\t\t}\n1091\t\n1092\t\treturn start, end, nil\n1093\t}\n1094\t\n1095\t// HeadObject handles S3 HeadObject.\n1096\tfunc (h *Handlers) HeadObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n1097\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1098\t\n1099\t\t// Fast path: serve from the in-memory manifest index when available,\n1100\t\t// avoiding a B2 HeadObject round-trip entirely.\n1101\t\tif h.manifest != nil {\n1102\t\t\tif entry, ok := h.manifest.Lookup(bucket, key); ok {\n1103\t\t\t\tif status := checkConditionalRequest(r, entry.ETag, entry.LastModified); status != 0 {\n1104\t\t\t\t\tif status == http.StatusNotModified {\n1105\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, entry.ETag))\n1106\t\t\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", entry.LastModified.UTC().Format(http.TimeFormat))\n1107\t\t\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n1108\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n1109\t\t\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"PreconditionFailed\", \"Precondition failed\", status)\n1110\t\t\t\t\t}\n1111\t\t\t\t\treturn\n1112\t\t\t\t}\n1113\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(entry.PlaintextSize, 10))\n1114\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", entry.ContentType)\n1115\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, entry.ETag))\n1116\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n1117\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", entry.LastModified.UTC().Format(http.TimeFormat))\n1118\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1119\t\t\t\treturn\n1120\t\t\t}\n1121\t\t}\n1122\t\n1123\t\t// Manifest miss or disabled: fall back to a B2 HeadObject call.\n1124\t\tinfo, err := h.backend.Head(ctx, bucket, key)\n1125\t\tif err != nil {\n1126\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchKey\", \"Object not found\", 404)\n1127\t\t\treturn\n1128\t\t}\n1129\t\n1130\t\t// Determine ETag and content info based on encryption status\n1131\t\tvar etag string\n1132\t\tvar contentLength int64\n1133\t\tvar contentType string\n1134\t\tif info.IsARMOREncrypted {\n1135\t\t\tif am, ok := backend.ParseARMORMetadata(info.Metadata); ok {\n1136\t\t\t\tetag = am.ETag\n1137\t\t\t\tcontentLength = am.PlaintextSize\n1138\t\t\t\tcontentType = am.ContentType\n1139\t\t\t} else {\n1140\t\t\t\tetag = info.ETag\n1141\t\t\t\tcontentLength = info.Size\n1142\t\t\t\tcontentType = info.ContentType\n1143\t\t\t}\n1144\t\t} else {\n1145\t\t\tetag = info.ETag\n1146\t\t\tcontentLength = info.Size\n1147\t\t\tcontentType = info.ContentType\n1148\t\t}\n1149\t\n1150\t\t// Check conditional request headers\n1151\t\tif status := checkConditionalRequest(r, etag, info.LastModified); status != 0 {\n1152\t\t\tif status == http.StatusNotModified {\n1153\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, etag))\n1154\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", info.LastModified.UTC().Format(http.TimeFormat))\n1155\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(status)\n1156\t\t\t} else {\n1157\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"PreconditionFailed\", \"Precondition failed\", status)\n1158\t\t\t}\n1159\t\t\treturn\n1160\t\t}\n1161\t\n1162\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", strconv.FormatInt(contentLength, 10))\n1163\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", contentType)\n1164\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, etag))\n1165\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n1166\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Last-Modified\", info.LastModified.UTC().Format(http.TimeFormat))\n1167\t\n1168\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1169\t}\n1170\t\n1171\t// DeleteObject handles S3 DeleteObject.\n1172\tfunc (h *Handlers) DeleteObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n1173\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1174\t\n1175\t\tif err := h.backend.Delete(ctx, bucket, key); err != nil {\n1176\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to delete: %v\", err), 500)\n1177\t\t\treturn\n1178\t\t}\n1179\t\n1180\t\t// Remove from manifest\n1181\t\tif h.manifest != nil {\n1182\t\t\th.manifest.RecordDelete(bucket, key)\n1183\t\t}\n1184\t\n1185\t\t// Invalidate metadata cache and list cache\n1186\t\th.cache.Delete(bucket, key)\n1187\t\tif h.listCache != nil {\n1188\t\t\th.listCache.InvalidatePrefix(bucket, path.Dir(key)+\"/\")\n1189\t\t}\n1190\t\n1191\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)\n1192\t}\n1193\t\n1194\t// CopyObject handles S3 CopyObject with DEK re-wrapping for ARMOR-encrypted objects.\n1195\t// This supports:\n1196\t// - Renaming files (same bucket, different key)\n1197\t// - Copying files (potentially different bucket)\n1198\t// - Key rotation (re-wraps DEK with current MEK)\n1199\tfunc (h *Handlers) CopyObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, dstBucket, dstKey string) {\n1200\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1201\t\n1202\t\t// Parse copy source header\n1203\t\tcopySource := r.Header.Get(\"x-amz-copy-source\")\n1204\t\tif copySource == \"\" {\n1205\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRequest\", \"Missing x-amz-copy-source header\", 400)\n1206\t\t\treturn\n1207\t\t}\n1208\t\n1209\t\t// Parse source bucket and key\n1210\t\t// Format: /bucket/key or bucket/key\n1211\t\tsrcBucket, srcKey := parseCopySource(copySource)\n1212\t\tif srcBucket == \"\" || srcKey == \"\" {\n1213\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidCopySource\", \"Invalid copy source format\", 400)\n1214\t\t\treturn\n1215\t\t}\n1216\t\n1217\t\t// Get source object metadata\n1218\t\tsrcInfo, err := h.backend.Head(ctx, srcBucket, srcKey)\n1219\t\tif err != nil {\n1220\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchKey\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Source object not found: %v\", err), 404)\n1221\t\t\treturn\n1222\t\t}\n1223\t\n1224\t\t// Check metadata directive\n1225\t\tmetadataDirective := r.Header.Get(\"x-amz-metadata-directive\")\n1226\t\treplaceMetadata := metadataDirective == \"REPLACE\"\n1227\t\n1228\t\t// Build response XML structure\n1229\t\ttype CopyObjectResult struct {\n1230\t\t\tXMLName      xml.Name `xml:\"CopyObjectResult\"`\n1231\t\t\tLastModified string   `xml:\"LastModified\"`\n1232\t\t\tETag         string   `xml:\"ETag\"`\n1233\t\t}\n1234\t\n1235\t\t// Handle ARMOR-encrypted objects\n1236\t\tif srcInfo.IsARMOREncrypted {\n1237\t\t\t// Parse ARMOR metadata\n1238\t\t\tarmorMeta, ok := backend.ParseARMORMetadata(srcInfo.Metadata)\n1239\t\t\tif !ok {\n1240\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to parse ARMOR metadata\", 500)\n1241\t\t\t\treturn\n1242\t\t\t}\n1243\t\n1244\t\t\t// Get the source MEK using the key ID from metadata\n1245\t\t\tsrcMEK, err := h.keyManager.GetMEKByID(armorMeta.KeyID)\n1246\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1247\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get source decryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n1248\t\t\t\treturn\n1249\t\t\t}\n1250\t\n1251\t\t\t// Unwrap DEK with source MEK\n1252\t\t\tdek, err := crypto.UnwrapDEK(srcMEK, armorMeta.WrappedDEK)\n1253\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1254\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to unwrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n1255\t\t\t\treturn\n1256\t\t\t}\n1257\t\n1258\t\t\t// Get the destination MEK for the target key\n1259\t\t\tdstMEK, dstKeyID, err := h.keyManager.GetMEK(dstKey)\n1260\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1261\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get destination encryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n1262\t\t\t\treturn\n1263\t\t\t}\n1264\t\n1265\t\t\t// Re-wrap DEK with destination MEK (handles key rotation and cross-prefix copy)\n1266\t\t\twrappedDEK, err := crypto.WrapDEK(dstMEK, dek)\n1267\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1268\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to re-wrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n1269\t\t\t\treturn\n1270\t\t\t}\n1271\t\n1272\t\t\t// Build new metadata with re-wrapped DEK and destination key ID\n1273\t\t\tnewMeta := (&backend.ARMORMetadata{\n1274\t\t\t\tVersion:       armorMeta.Version,\n1275\t\t\t\tBlockSize:     armorMeta.BlockSize,\n1276\t\t\t\tPlaintextSize: armorMeta.PlaintextSize,\n1277\t\t\t\tContentType:   armorMeta.ContentType,\n1278\t\t\t\tIV:            armorMeta.IV,\n1279\t\t\t\tWrappedDEK:    wrappedDEK,\n1280\t\t\t\tPlaintextSHA:  armorMeta.PlaintextSHA,\n1281\t\t\t\tETag:          armorMeta.ETag,\n1282\t\t\t\tKeyID:         dstKeyID,\n1283\t\t\t}).ToMetadata()\n1284\t\n1285\t\t\t// Handle REPLACE directive - copy custom metadata headers from request\n1286\t\t\tif replaceMetadata {\n1287\t\t\t\t// Check for new content-type in request\n1288\t\t\t\tif ct := r.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\"); ct != \"\" {\n1289\t\t\t\t\tnewMeta[\"x-amz-meta-armor-content-type\"] = ct\n1290\t\t\t\t}\n1291\t\t\t\t// Copy any additional custom headers from request\n1292\t\t\t\tfor k, v := range r.Header {\n1293\t\t\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(k, \"X-Amz-Meta-\") && !strings.HasPrefix(k, \"X-Amz-Meta-Armor-\") {\n1294\t\t\t\t\t\tnewMeta[strings.ToLower(k)] = v[0]\n1295\t\t\t\t\t}\n1296\t\t\t\t}\n1297\t\t\t}\n1298\t\n1299\t\t\t// Perform server-side copy with updated metadata\n1300\t\t\tif err := h.backend.Copy(ctx, srcBucket, srcKey, dstBucket, dstKey, newMeta, true); err != nil {\n1301\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Copy failed: %v\", err), 500)\n1302\t\t\t\treturn\n1303\t\t\t}\n1304\t\n1305\t\t\t// Record provenance for the copy\n1306\t\t\tif h.provenance != nil && h.provenance.ShouldRecord(dstKey) {\n1307\t\t\t\t_ = h.provenance.RecordUpload(ctx, dstKey, armorMeta.PlaintextSHA, \"copy\")\n1308\t\t\t}\n1309\t\n1310\t\t\t// Invalidate cache for destination\n1311\t\t\th.cache.Delete(dstBucket, dstKey)\n1312\t\t\th.footerCache.Delete(dstBucket, dstKey)\n1313\t\n1314\t\t\t// Return success response\n1315\t\t\tresult := CopyObjectResult{\n1316\t\t\t\tLastModified: time.Now().UTC().Format(\"2006-01-02T15:04:05.000Z\"),\n1317\t\t\t\tETag:         fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, armorMeta.ETag),\n1318\t\t\t}\n1319\t\n1320\t\t\toutput, err := xml.Marshal(result)\n1321\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1322\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to marshal response\", 500)\n1323\t\t\t\treturn\n1324\t\t\t}\n1325\t\n1326\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/xml\")\n1327\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1328\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(`<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>`))\n1329\t\t\tw.Write(output)\n1330\t\t\treturn\n1331\t\t}\n1332\t\n1333\t\t// Non-ARMOR object - pass through copy\n1334\t\tvar meta map[string]string\n1335\t\tif replaceMetadata {\n1336\t\t\tmeta = make(map[string]string)\n1337\t\t\tif ct := r.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\"); ct != \"\" {\n1338\t\t\t\tmeta[\"Content-Type\"] = ct\n1339\t\t\t}\n1340\t\t\tfor k, v := range r.Header {\n1341\t\t\t\tif strings.HasPrefix(k, \"X-Amz-Meta-\") {\n1342\t\t\t\t\tmeta[strings.ToLower(k)] = v[0]\n1343\t\t\t\t}\n1344\t\t\t}\n1345\t\t}\n1346\t\n1347\t\tif err := h.backend.Copy(ctx, srcBucket, srcKey, dstBucket, dstKey, meta, replaceMetadata); err != nil {\n1348\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Copy failed: %v\", err), 500)\n1349\t\t\treturn\n1350\t\t}\n1351\t\n1352\t\t// Get the destination object info for ETag\n1353\t\tdstInfo, err := h.backend.Head(ctx, dstBucket, dstKey)\n1354\t\tif err != nil {\n1355\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to get destination info\", 500)\n1356\t\t\treturn\n1357\t\t}\n1358\t\n1359\t\t// Return success response\n1360\t\tresult := CopyObjectResult{\n1361\t\t\tLastModified: time.Now().UTC().Format(\"2006-01-02T15:04:05.000Z\"),\n1362\t\t\tETag:         fmt.Sprintf(`\"%s\"`, dstInfo.ETag),\n1363\t\t}\n1364\t\n1365\t\toutput, err := xml.Marshal(result)\n1366\t\tif err != nil {\n1367\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to marshal response\", 500)\n1368\t\t\treturn\n1369\t\t}\n1370\t\n1371\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/xml\")\n1372\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1373\t\tw.Write([]byte(`<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>`))\n1374\t\tw.Write(output)\n1375\t}\n1376\t\n1377\t// parseCopySource parses the x-amz-copy-source header value.\n1378\t// Supports formats: /bucket/key or bucket/key\n1379\tfunc parseCopySource(copySource string) (bucket, key string) {\n1380\t\t// Remove leading slash if present\n1381\t\tcopySource = strings.TrimPrefix(copySource, \"/\")\n1382\t\n1383\t\t// URL decode the key portion (keys may contain special characters)\n1384\t\tif idx := strings.Index(copySource, \"/\"); idx != -1 {\n1385\t\t\tbucket = copySource[:idx]\n1386\t\t\tkey = copySource[idx+1:]\n1387\t\t\t// URL decode the key\n1388\t\t\tif decoded, err := url.QueryUnescape(key); err == nil {\n1389\t\t\t\tkey = decoded\n1390\t\t\t}\n1391\t\t}\n1392\t\n1393\t\treturn bucket, key\n1394\t}\n1395\t\n1396\t// ListObjectsV2 handles S3 ListObjectsV2.\n1397\tfunc (h *Handlers) ListObjectsV2(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket string) {\n1398\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1399\t\n1400\t\tprefix := r.URL.Query().Get(\"prefix\")\n1401\t\tdelimiter := r.URL.Query().Get(\"delimiter\")\n1402\t\tcontToken := r.URL.Query().Get(\"continuation-token\")\n1403\t\tmaxKeys := 1000\n1404\t\tif mk := r.URL.Query().Get(\"max-keys\"); mk != \"\" {\n1405\t\t\tif v, err := strconv.Atoi(mk); err == nil && v > 0 {\n1406\t\t\t\tmaxKeys = v\n1407\t\t\t}\n1408\t\t}\n1409\t\n1410\t\tvar result *backend.ListResult\n1411\t\tif h.listCache != nil {\n1412\t\t\tif cached, ok := h.listCache.Get(bucket, prefix, delimiter, maxKeys, contToken); ok {\n1413\t\t\t\tresult = cached\n1414\t\t\t}\n1415\t\t}\n1416\t\tif result == nil {\n1417\t\t\tvar err error\n1418\t\t\tresult, err = h.backend.List(ctx, bucket, prefix, delimiter, contToken, maxKeys)\n1419\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1420\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to list: %v\", err), 500)\n1421\t\t\t\treturn\n1422\t\t\t}\n1423\t\t\tif h.listCache != nil {\n1424\t\t\t\th.listCache.Set(bucket, prefix, delimiter, maxKeys, contToken, result)\n1425\t\t\t}\n1426\t\t}\n1427\t\n1428\t\t// Build XML response\n1429\t\ttype Contents struct {\n1430\t\t\tKey          string `xml:\"Key\"`\n1431\t\t\tLastModified string `xml:\"LastModified\"`\n1432\t\t\tETag         string `xml:\"ETag\"`\n1433\t\t\tSize         int64  `xml:\"Size\"`\n1434\t\t\tStorageClass string `xml:\"StorageClass\"`\n1435\t\t}\n1436\t\n1437\t\t// S3 spec: each CommonPrefixes entry is a separate wrapper element with one\n1438\t\t// Prefix child. Using []string with \"Outer>Inner\" produces an empty\n1439\t\t// <CommonPrefixes/> when the slice is nil, which the AWS SDK v1 parses as a\n1440\t\t// slice with one nil element — causing nil-pointer crashes in clients like\n1441\t\t// litestream. Using a dedicated struct + omitempty avoids this.\n1442\t\ttype CommonPrefix struct {\n1443\t\t\tPrefix string `xml:\"Prefix\"`\n1444\t\t}\n1445\t\n1446\t\ttype ListBucketResult struct {\n1447\t\t\tXMLName               xml.Name       `xml:\"ListBucketResult\"`\n1448\t\t\tXmlns                 string         `xml:\"xmlns,attr\"`\n1449\t\t\tName                  string         `xml:\"Name\"`\n1450\t\t\tPrefix                string         `xml:\"Prefix\"`\n1451\t\t\tDelimiter             string         `xml:\"Delimiter,omitempty\"`\n1452\t\t\tMaxKeys               int            `xml:\"MaxKeys\"`\n1453\t\t\tIsTruncated           bool           `xml:\"IsTruncated\"`\n1454\t\t\tNextContinuationToken string         `xml:\"NextContinuationToken,omitempty\"`\n1455\t\t\tContents              []Contents\n1456\t\t\tCommonPrefixes        []CommonPrefix `xml:\"CommonPrefixes,omitempty\"`\n1457\t\t}\n1458\t\n1459\t\tresp := ListBucketResult{\n1460\t\t\tXmlns:                 \"http://s3.amazonaws.com/doc/2006-03-01/\",\n1461\t\t\tName: CreateMultipartUpload handles S3 CreateMultipartUpload with ARMOR encryption.\n1686\t// It generates a DEK and IV, wraps the DEK, and stores the state in B2.\n1687\tfunc (h *Handlers) CreateMultipartUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key string) {\n1688\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1689\t\n1690\t\t// Get the appropriate MEK for this object key\n1691\t\tmek, keyID, err := h.keyManager.GetMEK(key)\n1692\t\tif err != nil {\n1693\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get encryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n1694\t\t\treturn\n1695\t\t}\n1696\t\n1697\t\t// Generate DEK and IV for this upload\n1698\t\tdek, err := crypto.GenerateDEK()\n1699\t\tif err != nil {\n1700\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n1701\t\t\treturn\n1702\t\t}\n1703\t\n1704\t\tiv, err := crypto.GenerateIV()\n1705\t\tif err != nil {\n1706\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate IV: %v\", err), 500)\n1707\t\t\treturn\n1708\t\t}\n1709\t\n1710\t\t// Wrap DEK with MEK\n1711\t\twrappedDEK, err := crypto.WrapDEK(mek, dek)\n1712\t\tif err != nil {\n1713\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to wrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n1714\t\t\treturn\n1715\t\t}\n1716\t\n1717\t\t// Get content type\n1718\t\tcontentType := r.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n1719\t\tif contentType == \"\" {\n1720\t\t\tcontentType = \"application/octet-stream\"\n1721\t\t}\n1722\t\n1723\t\t// Initiate multipart upload with B2 (no ARMOR metadata yet - that comes on completion)\n1724\t\tuploadID, err := h.backend.CreateMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, nil)\n1725\t\tif err != nil {\n1726\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create multipart upload: %v\", err), 500)\n1727\t\t\treturn\n1728\t\t}\n1729\t\n1730\t\t// Save multipart state to B2\n1731\t\tstate := &backend.MultipartState{\n1732\t\t\tUploadID:       uploadID,\n1733\t\t\tBucket:         bucket,\n1734\t\t\tKey:            key,\n1735\t\t\tIV:             iv,\n1736\t\t\tWrappedDEK:     wrappedDEK,\n1737\t\t\tBlockSize:      h.config.BlockSize,\n1738\t\t\tCreated:        time.Now(),\n1739\t\t\tContentType:    contentType,\n1740\t\t\tKeyID:          keyID,\n1741\t\t\tEncryptedBytes: 0,\n1742\t\t\tPartHMACs:      make(map[int]string),\n1743\t\t\tPartSizes:      make(map[int]int64),\n1744\t\t}\n1745\t\n1746\t\tmanager := backend.NewMultipartStateManager(h.backend, bucket)\n1747\t\tif err := manager.SaveState(ctx, state); err != nil {\n1748\t\t\t// Try to abort the upload on state save failure\n1749\t\t\th.backend.AbortMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID)\n1750\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to save multipart state: %v\", err), 500)\n1751\t\t\treturn\n1752\t\t}\n1753\t\n1754\t\t// Build XML response\n1755\t\ttype InitiateMultipartUploadResult struct {\n1756\t\t\tXMLName  xml.Name `xml:\"InitiateMultipartUploadResult\"`\n1757\t\t\tXmlns    string   `xml:\"xmlns,attr\"`\n1758\t\t\tBucket   string   `xml:\"Bucket\"`\n1759\t\t\tKey      string   `xml:\"Key\"`\n1760\t\t\tUploadID string   `xml:\"UploadId\"`\n1761\t\t}\n1762\t\n1763\t\tresult := InitiateMultipartUploadResult{\n1764\t\t\tXmlns:    \"http://s3.amazonaws.com/doc/2006-03-01/\",\n1765\t\t\tBucket:   bucket,\n1766\t\t\tKey:      key,\n1767\t\t\tUploadID: uploadID,\n1768\t\t}\n1769\t\n1770\t\toutput, err := xml.Marshal(result)\n1771\t\tif err != nil {\n1772\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to marshal response\", 500)\n1773\t\t\treturn\n1774\t\t}\n1775\t\n1776\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/xml\")\n1777\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1778\t\tw.Write([]byte(`<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>`))\n1779\t\tw.Write(output)\n1780\t}\n1781\t\n1782\t// UploadPart handles S3 UploadPart with encryption.\n1783\t// Each part is encrypted with a CTR counter offset based on cumulative encrypted bytes.\n1784\tfunc (h *Handlers) UploadPart(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key, uploadID string) {\n1785\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1786\t\n1787\t\t// Parse part number\n1788\t\tpartNumberStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"partNumber\")\n1789\t\tif partNumberStr == \"\" {\n1790\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRequest\", \"Missing partNumber\", 400)\n1791\t\t\treturn\n1792\t\t}\n1793\t\tpartNumber, err := strconv.ParseInt(partNumberStr, 10, 32)\n1794\t\tif err != nil || partNumber < 1 || partNumber > 10000 {\n1795\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRequest\", \"Invalid partNumber\", 400)\n1796\t\t\treturn\n1797\t\t}\n1798\t\n1799\t\t// Load multipart state\n1800\t\tmanager := backend.NewMultipartStateManager(h.backend, bucket)\n1801\t\tstate, err := manager.LoadState(ctx, uploadID)\n1802\t\tif err != nil {\n1803\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchUpload\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Multipart upload not found: %v\", err), 404)\n1804\t\t\treturn\n1805\t\t}\n1806\t\n1807\t\t// Verify bucket and key match\n1808\t\tif state.Bucket != bucket || state.Key != key {\n1809\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchUpload\", \"Multipart upload does not match bucket/key\", 404)\n1810\t\t\treturn\n1811\t\t}\n1812\t\n1813\t\t// Read plaintext part\n1814\t\tplaintext, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n1815\t\tif err != nil {\n1816\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read body: %v\", err), 500)\n1817\t\t\treturn\n1818\t\t}\n1819\t\n1820\t\tplaintextSize := int64(len(plaintext))\n1821\t\n1822\t\t// Get the MEK for this upload using the key ID from state\n1823\t\tmek, err := h.keyManager.GetMEKByID(state.KeyID)\n1824\t\tif err != nil {\n1825\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get decryption key: %v\", err), 500)\n1826\t\t\treturn\n1827\t\t}\n1828\t\n1829\t\t// Unwrap DEK\n1830\t\tdek, err := crypto.UnwrapDEK(mek, state.WrappedDEK)\n1831\t\tif err != nil {\n1832\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to unwrap DEK: %v\", err), 500)\n1833\t\t\treturn\n1834\t\t}\n1835\t\n1836\t\t// Calculate starting block index for CTR counter\n1837\t\t// Each block is blockSize bytes, so counter = encryptedBytes / blockSize\n1838\t\tstartBlockIndex := uint32(state.EncryptedBytes / int64(state.BlockSize))\n1839\t\n1840\t\t// Create encryptor with the part's starting counter\n1841\t\tencryptor, err := crypto.NewEncryptorWithCounter(dek, state.IV, state.BlockSize, startBlockIndex)\n1842\t\tif err != nil {\n1843\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to create encryptor: %v\", err), 500)\n1844\t\t\treturn\n1845\t\t}\n1846\t\n1847\t\t// Encrypt the part\n1848\t\tencrypted, hmacTable, err := encryptor.Encrypt(plaintext)\n1849\t\tif err != nil {\n1850\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to encrypt: %v\", err), 500)\n1851\t\t\treturn\n1852\t\t}\n1853\t\n1854\t\t// Derive HMAC key\n1855\t\thmacKey := crypto.DeriveHMACKey(dek)\n1856\t\n1857\t\t// Compute block HMACs\n1858\t\tblockHMACs, err := backend.ComputeBlockHMACs(encrypted, state.BlockSize, hmacKey, startBlockIndex)\n1859\t\tif err != nil {\n1860\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to compute HMACs: %v\", err), 500)\n1861\t\t\treturn\n1862\t\t}\n1863\t\n1864\t\t// Upload encrypted part to B2\n1865\t\tetag, err := h.backend.UploadPart(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, int32(partNumber), bytes.NewReader(encrypted), int64(len(encrypted)))\n1866\t\tif err != nil {\n1867\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to upload part: %v\", err), 500)\n1868\t\t\treturn\n1869\t\t}\n1870\t\n1871\t\t// Update state with cumulative bytes and part HMACs\n1872\t\tstate.EncryptedBytes += int64(len(encrypted))\n1873\t\tstate.PartHMACs[int(partNumber)] = backend.EncodeHMACToBase64(blockHMACs)\n1874\t\tstate.PartSizes[int(partNumber)] = plaintextSize\n1875\t\n1876\t\tif err := manager.SaveState(ctx, state); err != nil {\n1877\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to update multipart state: %v\", err), 500)\n1878\t\t\treturn\n1879\t\t}\n1880\t\n1881\t\t// Return ETag - suppress unused variable warning\n1882\t\t_ = hmacTable\n1883\t\n1884\t\tw.Header().Set(\"ETag\", etag)\n1885\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1886\t}\n1887\t\n1888\t// CompleteMultipartUpload handles S3 CompleteMultipartUpload.\n1889\t// It assembles the parts in B2 and stores the HMAC table as a sidecar.\n1890\tfunc (h *Handlers) CompleteMultipartUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key, uploadID string) {\n1891\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1892\t\n1893\t\t// Load multipart state\n1894\t\tmanager := backend.NewMultipartStateManager(h.backend, bucket)\n1895\t\tstate, err := manager.LoadState(ctx, uploadID)\n1896\t\tif err != nil {\n1897\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchUpload\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Multipart upload not found: %v\", err), 404)\n1898\t\t\treturn\n1899\t\t}\n1900\t\n1901\t\t// Verify bucket and key match\n1902\t\tif state.Bucket != bucket || state.Key != key {\n1903\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"NoSuchUpload\", \"Multipart upload does not match bucket/key\", 404)\n1904\t\t\treturn\n1905\t\t}\n1906\t\n1907\t\t// Parse the CompleteMultipartUpload request XML\n1908\t\ttype Part struct {\n1909\t\t\tPartNumber int    `xml:\"PartNumber\"`\n1910\t\t\tETag       string `xml:\"ETag\"`\n1911\t\t}\n1912\t\n1913\t\ttype CompleteMultipartUploadReq struct {\n1914\t\t\tXMLName xml.Name `xml:\"CompleteMultipartUpload\"`\n1915\t\t\tParts   []Part   `xml:\"Part\"`\n1916\t\t}\n1917\t\n1918\t\tvar completeReq CompleteMultipartUploadReq\n1919\t\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n1920\t\tif err != nil {\n1921\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read body: %v\", err), 500)\n1922\t\t\treturn\n1923\t\t}\n1924\t\n1925\t\tif err := xml.Unmarshal(body, &completeReq); err != nil {\n1926\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"MalformedXML\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to parse XML: %v\", err), 400)\n1927\t\t\treturn\n1928\t\t}\n1929\t\n1930\t\tif len(completeReq.Parts) == 0 {\n1931\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InvalidRequest\", \"No parts specified\", 400)\n1932\t\t\treturn\n1933\t\t}\n1934\t\n1935\t\t// Convert to backend.CompletedPart\n1936\t\tparts := make([]backend.CompletedPart, len(completeReq.Parts))\n1937\t\tfor i, p := range completeReq.Parts {\n1938\t\t\tparts[i] = backend.CompletedPart{\n1939\t\t\t\tPartNumber: int32(p.PartNumber),\n1940\t\t\t\tETag:       p.ETag,\n1941\t\t\t}\n1942\t\t}\n1943\t\n1944\t\t// Calculate total plaintext size\n1945\t\tvar totalPlaintextSize int64\n1946\t\tfor _, p := range completeReq.Parts {\n1947\t\t\tif size, ok := state.PartSizes[p.PartNumber]; ok {\n1948\t\t\t\ttotalPlaintextSize += size\n1949\t\t\t}\n1950\t\t}\n1951\t\n1952\t\t// Assemble all block HMACs in order\n1953\t\tvar allBlockHMACs [][]byte\n1954\t\tfor _, p := range completeReq.Parts {\n1955\t\t\tif hmacsBase64, ok := state.PartHMACs[p.PartNumber]; ok {\n1956\t\t\t\thmacs, err := backend.DecodeHMACFromBase64(hmacsBase64)\n1957\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1958\t\t\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to decode HMACs for part %d: %v\", p.PartNumber, err), 500)\n1959\t\t\t\t\treturn\n1960\t\t\t\t}\n1961\t\t\t\tallBlockHMACs = append(allBlockHMACs, hmacs...)\n1962\t\t\t}\n1963\t\t}\n1964\t\n1965\t\t// Complete the multipart upload in B2\n1966\t\tetag, err := h.backend.CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, parts)\n1967\t\tif err != nil {\n1968\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to complete multipart upload: %v\", err), 500)\n1969\t\t\treturn\n1970\t\t}\n1971\t\n1972\t\t// Store HMAC table as sidecar\n1973\t\tif err := manager.SaveHMACTable(ctx, key, allBlockHMACs, state.BlockSize); err != nil {\n1974\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to save HMAC table: %v\", err), 500)\n1975\t\t\treturn\n1976\t\t}\n1977\t\n1978\t\t// Compute plaintext SHA-256 (we don't have the full plaintext, so use a placeholder)\n1979\t\t// In a full implementation, we'd track SHA during upload\n1980\t\tplaintextSHA := sha256.Sum256([]byte{})\n1981\t\n1982\t\t// Build ARMOR metadata and update via CopyObject\n1983\t\tmeta := (&backend.ARMORMetadata{\n1984\t\t\tVersion:       1,\n1985\t\t\tBlockSize:     state.BlockSize,\n1986\t\t\tPlaintextSize: totalPlaintextSize,\n1987\t\t\tContentType:   state.ContentType,\n1988\t\t\tIV:            state.IV,\n1989\t\t\tWrappedDEK:    state.WrappedDEK,\n1990\t\t\tPlaintextSHA:  hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]),\n1991\t\t\tETag:          etag,\n1992\t\t\tKeyID:         state.KeyID,\n1993\t\t}).ToMetadata()\n1994\t\n1995\t\t// Add multipart flag to indicate HMAC table is external\n1996\t\tmeta[\"x-amz-meta-armor-multipart\"] = \"true\"\n1997\t\n1998\t\t// Update metadata via CopyObject\n1999\t\tif err := h.backend.Copy(ctx, bucket, key, bucket, key, meta, true); err != nil {\n2000\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to update metadata: %v\", err), 500)\n2001\t\t\treturn\n2002\t\t}\n2003\t\n2004\t\t// Clean up multipart state\n2005\t\tmanager.DeleteState(ctx, uploadID)\n2006\t\n2007\t\t// Record in manifest for fast metadata lookup (async B2 persistence)\n2008\t\tif h.manifest != nil {\n2009\t\t\th.manifest.RecordPut(bucket, key, totalPlaintextSize, hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]), state.IV, state.WrappedDEK, state.BlockSize, state.ContentType, etag)\n2010\t\t}\n2011\t\n2012\t\t// Record provenance for the multipart upload\n2013\t\tif h.provenance != nil && h.provenance.ShouldRecord(key) {\n2014\t\t\t_ = h.provenance.RecordUpload(ctx, key, hex.EncodeToString(plaintextSHA[:]), \"multipart\")\n2015\t\t}\n2016\t\n2017\t\t// Build XML response\n2018\t\ttype CompleteMultipartUploadResult struct {\n2019\t\t\tXMLName  xml.Name `xml:\"CompleteMultipartUploadResult\"`\n2020\t\t\tXmlns    string   `xml:\"xmlns,attr\"`\n2021\t\t\tLocation string   `xml:\"Location\"`\n2022\t\t\tBucket   string   `xml:\"Bucket\"`\n2023\t\t\tKey      string   `xml:\"Key\"`\n2024\t\t\tETag     string   `xml:\"ETag\"`\n2025\t\t}\n2026\t\n2027\t\tresult := CompleteMultipartUploadResult{\n2028\t\t\tXmlns:    \"http://s3.amazonaws.com/doc/2006-03-01/\",\n2029\t\t\tLocation: fmt.Sprintf(\"/%s/%s\", bucket, key),\n2030\t\t\tBucket:   bucket,\n2031\t\t\tKey:      key,\n2032\t\t\tETag:     etag,\n2033\t\t}\n2034\t\n2035\t\toutput, err := xml.Marshal(result)\n2036\t\tif err != nil {\n2037\t\t\th.writeError(w, \"InternalError\", \"Failed to marshal response\", 500)\n2038\t\t\treturn\n2039\t\t}\n2040\t\n2041\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/xml\")\n2042\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n2043\t\tw.Write([]byte(`<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>`))\n2044\t\tw.Write(output)\n2045\t}\n2046\t\n2047\t// AbortMultipartUpload handles S3 AbortMultipartUpload.\n2048\t// It deletes the multipart state and forwards the abort to B2.\n2049\tfunc (h *Handlers) AbortMultipartUpload(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, bucket, key, uploadID string) {\n2050\t\tctx := r.Context()\n2051\t\n2052\t\t// Load multipart state to
